requirements.summary: Add entrance and interactive animations to BankFinanceBanner using CSS keyframes or Tailwind utilities
acceptanceCriteria: The BankFinanceBanner section animates in (fade + slide-up) when it enters the viewport on scroll
The '90%' loan highlight text or badge has a continuous pulse or glow animation to attract attention
The banner background has a periodic shimmer or shine sweep effect
The WhatsApp CTA button scales up and glows on hover with a smooth transition
Animations do not block interactivity or cause layout shifts
All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion media query (animations are disabled or minimized for accessibility)

file_operations.description: Add scroll-triggered fade-in and slide-up entrance animation using Intersection Observer API. Add a continuous pulse/glow animation to the '90%' loan figure using CSS keyframes or Tailwind animate-pulse. Add a periodic shimmer/shine sweep animation to the banner background using CSS keyframes with a linear gradient animation. Add hover scale and glow effects to the WhatsApp CTA button using Tailwind hover utilities and transition classes. Wrap all animations in a prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable or minimize them for accessibility. Preserve all existing content, copy, and the WhatsApp link (wa.me/917838867880).

Add custom CSS keyframe animations for the shimmer/shine sweep effect on the banner background and the pulse/glow effect on the loan figure. Define animations using @keyframes and include prefers-reduced-motion media query overrides to disable or reduce motion for users who prefer reduced motion. Use existing Tailwind layer structure.
